# Cotswold House Co.

## About
Cotswold House Co. is a British-inspired interior design studio based in Greenville, South Carolina, founded by Dani Wilkinson. Originally from the Cotswolds, England, Dani brings classic British interior design and curated English decor to the Upstate.

## Services
- Interior Design: Room refreshes, renovations, and full custom home builds with a highly curated, detail-driven approach.
- Decor: Hand-selected items from the Cotswolds and across England, bringing a piece of England to North America.
- Staging: Curated decor and soft furnishings for residential real estate and curated events.
- Rare Finds: Special sourcing requests. We find specific pieces, periods, and styles directly from England.

## Location
Greenville, South Carolina. Serving the Upstate SC area including Simpsonville, Greer, and Travelers Rest.

## Contact
Email: hello@cotswoldhouseco.com
Website: https://cotswoldhouseco.com
Instagram: https://instagram.com/cotswoldhouseco

## Founder
Dani Wilkinson — Originally from the Cotswolds, England. Moved to Greenville, SC six years ago. Bringing classic British decor and interior design to the American South.
